metadata.description: Generic skills for better decisions: structured analytic techniques, decision analysis, modeling & simulation, and data analysis.

plugins.name: decision-analytics-toolkit
plugins.description: Six general-purpose skills for individuals and small teams: a decision coach that facilitates a deliberate, user-led decision process over time (problem framing, measurable success criteria, options, indicators to watch, scheduled monitoring), plus structured analytic techniques, decision analysis, modeling & simulation, data analysis, and decision review (calibration and tracking whether estimates and assumptions held up).
